meaning: n.[生理]成红血球细胞,有核红血球
examples: These were 85.7% of patients with myelocytes and premonocyte, 52.4% of patients with erythroblast in their blood smear respectively.
Micronuclei (MN) effect induced in the polychromatophilic erythroblast (PCE) of mouse bone marrow by refuse landfill leachate was studied.
